# synastry

```go
import "github.com/shaobaobaoer/solarsage-mcp/pkg/synastry"
```

Package synastry scores relationship compatibility by analyzing cross\-aspects between two natal charts.

CalcSynastryScore evaluates pre\-computed cross\-aspects into a weighted SynastryScore with category breakdowns \(harmony, tension, attraction\). CalcSynastryFromCharts is a convenience function that computes aspects and scores in one step from two sets of planet positions.

## type [CategoryScore](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/synastry/synastry.go#L32-L36>)

CategoryScore groups scores by relationship category

```go
type CategoryScore struct {
    Category string  `json:"category"`
    Score    float64 `json:"score"`
    Count    int     `json:"count"`
}
```

<a name="ScoredAspect"></a>
## type [ScoredAspect](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/synastry/synastry.go#L22-L29>)

ScoredAspect is an aspect with its contribution score

```go
type ScoredAspect struct {
    PersonA    string            `json:"person_a"`
    PersonB    string            `json:"person_b"`
    AspectType models.AspectType `json:"aspect_type"`
    Orb        float64           `json:"orb"`
    Score      float64           `json:"score"`
    Category   string            `json:"category"`
}
```

<a name="SynastryScore"></a>
## type [SynastryScore](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/synastry/synastry.go#L12-L19>)

SynastryScore holds the relationship compatibility analysis

```go
type SynastryScore struct {
    TotalScore     float64         `json:"total_score"`
    Harmony        float64         `json:"harmony"`       // positive aspects score
    Tension        float64         `json:"tension"`       // challenging aspects score
    Compatibility  float64         `json:"compatibility"` // 0-100 percentage
    TopAspects     []ScoredAspect  `json:"top_aspects"`
    CategoryScores []CategoryScore `json:"category_scores"`
}
```
